codeReview.summary: The synthesis document comprehensively addresses all three validation assertions (VAL-FUNC-001, VAL-FUNC-002, VAL-FUNC-003). Features are listed with value evaluation, domain refactorings are evaluated with specific evidence, and bugs are documented with severity and fix recommendations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The synthesis uses a consistent evaluation framework with tables, file:line citations, and severity ratings. This pattern should be documented in AGENTS.md for future synthesis tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All three synthesis documents (code-quality, functionality, tests) follow the same format with tables, evidence citations, and declared winners

sharedStateObservations.observation: The SQL validation regression was correctly identified by comparing main and gem versions of pkg/protheus/query.go. Main uses regex-based dangerous keyword detection, gem only checks query prefix.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: main: pkg/protheus/query.go has dangerous keywords list (INSERT, DROP, etc.) with regex matching. gem: pkg/protheus/query.go:44-58 only checks HasPrefix( SELECT|WITH|EXEC)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mutex bug was correctly identified. In pkg/confluence/export.go:214-217, the mutex is declared locally inside exportSinglePage(), meaning each goroutine gets its own mutex instance - no actual synchronization occurs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: pkg/confluence/export.go:214-217: `mu := sync.Mutex{}` inside goroutine function vs. shared mutex at ExportPages level

summary: PASS - The synthesis-functionality-analysis document fully satisfies all validation assertions. VAL-FUNC-001: 7 features listed with value evaluation (ALTO/MEDIO/BAJO). VAL-FUNC-002: Each domain refactoring evaluated with type (Mejora Real/Regresión/Cosmético) and evidence with file:line citations. VAL-FUNC-003: 3 bugs documented with severity (CRÍTICO/ALTO), affected code, and fix recommendations. The synthesis correctly identified the SQL validation regression and mutex bug through code comparison.
